businessSummary.oneLiner: Government and commercial AI data analytics platform leader, with the Gotham (defense), Foundry (enterprise), and AIP (AI platform) trifecta
businessSummary.description: Palantir builds AI data analytics platforms for government and enterprise. FY2025 revenue $4.48B (+56%). US commercial revenue topped $650M (Q4 +137% YoY). Pentagon adopted Maven AI as an official program of record, expanding across the military. Selected as software developer for the $185B Golden Dome missile defense project. Surged 6.2% on Mar 31 on Stellantis 5-year renewal and IRS contract.
howTheyMakeMoney: Enterprise AI platform (Foundry) - Enterprise data integration
AIP (AI Platform) - Generative AI integration platform
AIP Bootcamps - Short-term adoption programs driving customer conversion

keyMetrics.name: P/E (TTM)
keyMetrics.interpretation: 10x the S&P 500 average (22x). Reflects 56% growth but requires sustained 40%+ growth for years to justify

keyMetrics.name: Revenue Growth (YoY)
keyMetrics.interpretation: FY2025 $4.48B. Four consecutive years of accelerating growth. US commercial segment drove +137% growth

keyMetrics.name: Operating Margin
keyMetrics.interpretation: Rapidly improving: FY2023 5.4% → FY2024 10.8% → FY2025 31.6%. Top-tier among SaaS companies

keyMetrics.name: Net Margin
keyMetrics.interpretation: Net income $1.63B. Includes $229M interest income from large cash holdings

keyMetrics.name: Free Cash Flow
keyMetrics.interpretation: +84% growth. 47% FCF margin is best-in-class for software. Exceptional cash generation

keyMetrics.name: Gross Margin
keyMetrics.interpretation: Pure software-level margins. Revenue growth creates extreme operating leverage

growthDrivers.title: Stellantis 5-year partnership renewal + AIP adoption (Mar 31)
growthDrivers.description: Palantir IR: Stellantis added AIP on top of Foundry, renewing for 5 years. Key proof that enterprise customers are expanding into the AI platform. Catalyzed +6.2% surge

growthDrivers.title: IRS $1.8M contract (Mar 31)
growthDrivers.description: US IRS contracted Palantir for audit target identification and tax collection tools. Non-defense government expansion

growthDrivers.title: Cathie Wood: Palantir is the biggest defense AI play (Mar 28)
growthDrivers.description: ARK Invest's Cathie Wood called Palantir 'the most important defense tech company.' More leverage than smaller defense firms

growthDrivers.title: Michael Burry signals short cover (Mar 31)
growthDrivers.description: Benzinga: Held $900M PLTR put position. Posted 'Shorts are not forever.' Major short seller exit reduces downward pressure

growthDrivers.title: Golden Dome $185B + Maven adoption = long-term contracts
growthDrivers.description: Pentagon Maven is now an official program of record. Golden Dome is missile defense infrastructure. Long-term demand independent of war outcomes

growthDrivers.title: Citi $260, Wedbush $230, Mizuho $195 maintained
growthDrivers.description: Citi Tyler Radke $260 (+78%), Wedbush $230 (+57%), Mizuho $195 Outperform. Major institutional bulls maintain conviction

competitiveAdvantage.summary: 20+ years of government defense AI track record, top-level security clearances, Maven military adoption, Iran war battlefield validation

moats.description: Ontology platform deeply integrated into government/military systems. Replacement costs are prohibitively high
Highest-level security clearances and 20+ year government trust relationships. New entrants cannot replicate
Real-time targeting in the Iran conflict. Maven adoption as program of record confirms long-term demand
AIP Bootcamps drive rapid customer acquisition. Ontology data model ecosystem continues expanding

competitors.name: Anduril Industries
competitors.detail: Defense AI/drone startup. Collaborates with Palantir on Golden Dome

competitors.name: Snowflake / Databricks
competitors.detail: Enterprise data platform competitors. Significantly behind in government access

competitors.name: Microsoft / AWS
competitors.detail: Cloud giants entering government AI. Lack deep integration capabilities

recentNews.headline: Stellantis 5-year partnership renewal + AIP expansion
recentNews.significance: Existing Foundry customer added AIP. Confirms cross-sell expansion pattern

recentNews.headline: IRS $1.8M contract
recentNews.significance: Non-defense government expansion into tax administration

recentNews.headline: Michael Burry signals short cover
recentNews.significance: $900M put position potentially being closed. 'Shorts are not forever'. Downward pressure relief

recentNews.headline: Cathie Wood: Palantir is biggest defense AI company
recentNews.significance: ARK Invest names Palantir as top defense tech pick

recentNews.headline: PLTR +6.2% in broad market rally
recentNews.significance: War-end signal drives tech rally. PLTR outperforms market

analystOpinions.notableComment: Citi $260 (+78%), Wedbush $230 (+57%), Mizuho $195 Outperform. Opinion dispersion is wide but bull cases are strong

risks.title: Extreme valuation
risks.description: P/E 217x is expensive even for 56% growth. Multiple compression risk if growth falls below 40%

risks.title: Massive insider selling
risks.description: Peter Thiel sold $290M (Mar 2), Karp/Sankar/Cohen also selling continuously. Market watches why the CEO sells

risks.title: War-end defense narrative weakening
risks.description: Iran war end could reduce defense premium. However, Maven/Golden Dome are structural long-term programs

risks.title: Stock-based compensation dilution
risks.description: Share count growing 4.67% annually. High SBC dilutes existing shareholder value

risks.title: Government budget risk
risks.description: DOGE and government spending cuts could impact government contracts long-term

buyReasons.title: US commercial revenue +137% explosive growth
buyReasons.rationale: Q4 US commercial revenue surged 137% YoY. AIP Bootcamps are rapidly converting enterprise customers

buyReasons.title: Stellantis renewal confirms AIP expansion
buyReasons.rationale: Existing Foundry customer added AIP for 5 more years. Cross-sell strategy is working

buyReasons.title: 47% FCF margin, exceptional cash generation
buyReasons.rationale: $2.1B FCF, up 84%. Among the highest FCF margins in the software industry

buyReasons.title: Golden Dome + Maven = structural defense demand
buyReasons.rationale: Long-term programs independent of war outcomes. Missile defense and AI intelligence systems are permanent needs

overallOpinion: Stellantis 5-year renewal and IRS contract confirm non-defense revenue expansion. Cathie Wood naming Palantir as the top defense AI company is also a positive signal.
P/E 217x is demanding, but 56% revenue growth and 47% FCF margin provide support. The premium is justified as long as growth rates hold.
Down 30% from the 52-week high to $145.80. Trading below both 50-day ($155) and 200-day ($148) with RSI 42 neutral. Peter Thiel's massive sales are a near-term overhang.

investmentVerdict.summary: US commercial revenue growing 137% and Stellantis AIP expansion tell a powerful growth story. But P/E 217x combined with Peter Thiel's $290M sale cannot be ignored. A dip to the $130 range would create a buy opportunity. Current levels warrant watching rather than buying.

x.hook: Stellantis renews for 5 years, AIP is the real growth engine
x.text:
$PLTR $145.80(+6.2%) Stellantis 5-year renewal + AIP adoption. Existing customers expanding into the AI platform. IRS contract expands non-defense government too.

1/4
thread:
US commercial revenue +137% YoY, FCF margin 47%. Numbers are perfect. Problem is P/E 217x. This growth has to sustain for years.

2/4

Peter Thiel sold $290M. Continuous insider selling is a near-term concern. But Burry is covering shorts too.

3/4

Target $199 (+36%). RSI 42 neutral, below 50-day ($155). A dip to $130 range would be a buy.

4/4

threads.hook: Stellantis renews for 5 years, AIP is the real growth engine
threads.text:
$PLTR $145.80(+6.2%)

Stellantis renewed for 5 years and added AIP on top of Foundry. This confirms the pattern: existing customers are expanding into the AI platform. IRS contract also expands non-defense government business.

US commercial +137%, FCF margin 47% — numbers are flawless. But P/E 217x and Peter Thiel's $290M sale create headwinds. Below 50-day ($155), RSI 42.

Target $199 (+36%). Wait for a dip to $130 range for better entry.

$PLTR $145.80(+6.2%) Founder sells $290M. Short seller covers. Customer signs for 5 more years. Who do you listen to?

empathy.hook: 30% off the highs, but growth hasn't stopped
empathy.text:
$PLTR $145.80(+6.2%) Down 30% from $207 high. Thiel selling, short attacks. It hasn't been easy. But commercial revenue +137%, Stellantis renewed.

1/4
thread:
The valuation adjusted, not the growth. P/E 217x is still demanding, but FCF 47% is real.

2/4

Golden Dome and Maven are long-term structural demand, independent of war outcomes.

3/4

Target $199 (+36%). A bit more patience and a better entry may come. No rush.

4/4

empathy.text:
$PLTR $145.80(+6.2%)

Down 30% from $207. Thiel selling, shorts attacking. Hard to hold through that. But commercial revenue +137% and Stellantis renewed for 5 years. Growth hasn't stopped.

P/E 217x is demanding but FCF 47% is real. Golden Dome and Maven are structural long-term demand. Target $199 (+36%). A better entry may come with patience.
